<diagram name="AFE Signal Chain" id="afe_chain"> <mxGraphModel dx="963" dy="712" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="INPUT" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">输入信号</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="50" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ACDC" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">输入耦合</font><div><font style="font-size: 14px;">方式</font><span style="font-size: 14px; background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">选择</span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="100" x="160" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ATTEN" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">1MΩ 精密分压衰减网</font><span style="font-size: 14px; background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">(档位</span><span style="font-size: 14px; background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">选择 1x/10x/50x/100x)</span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="290" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BUFFER" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">电压跟随器<br>阻抗匹配</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="120" x="480" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="AMP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">反相加法/比例放大</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="630" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ADC" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="<font style="font-size: 14px;">STM32</font><div><font style="font-size: 14px;">ADC<br>(0~3.3V)</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="80" x="800" y="280" as="geometry" /> target="ACDC"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge2" edge="1" parent="1" source="ACDC" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ATTEN"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell>
